title: Assess olive oil for style and quality
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assess olive oil for style and quality demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish and implement appropriate tasting protocols

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish appropriate tasting conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish appropriate tasting conditions.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply industry tasting procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply industry tasting procedures.

pcs.text: Determine oils to taste, and taste oils in the order that will best show the character of each oil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine oils to taste, and taste oils in the order that will best show the character of each oil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine oils to taste, and taste oils in the order that will best show the character of each oil.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish and implement appropriate tasting protocols

elements.title: Determine style and sensory quality of the olive oil

pcs.text: Identify and assess characteristics of the olive oil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess characteristics of the olive oil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess characteristics of the olive oil.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Taste oil to assess style?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Taste oil to assess style.

pcs.text: Smell and taste oil to assess sensory quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Smell and taste oil to assess sensory quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Smell and taste oil to assess sensory quality.

pcs.text: Analyse and record observed defects for future action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse and record observed defects for future action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse and record observed defects for future action.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine style and sensory quality of the olive oil

elements.title: Determine the analytical quality of the olive oil

pcs.text: Send oil samples to laboratory to test key chemical indices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Send oil samples to laboratory to test key chemical indices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Send oil samples to laboratory to test key chemical indices.

pcs.text: Interpret key chemical indices to assess analytical quality of oil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret key chemical indices to assess analytical quality of oil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret key chemical indices to assess analytical quality of oil.

pcs.text: Record observed chemical indices that are beyond the normal range, for future action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record observed chemical indices that are beyond the normal range, for future action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record observed chemical indices that are beyond the normal range, for future action.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify horticultural factors that may influence the style and quality of the olive oil.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify other factors that may influence the style and quality of the olive oil.

elements.title: Implement findings of tastings and chemical analyses

pcs.text: Maintain records of season tastings and chemical analyses

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of season tastings and chemical analyses.

pcs.text: Evaluate horticultural and processing activities and methods to identify modifications and improvements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate horticultural and processing activities and methods to identify modifications and improvements.

pcs.text: Adjust and document horticultural production plan for next season

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust and document horticultural production plan for next season.

pcs.text: Document and communicate next season processing requirements to processing personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and communicate next season processing requirements to processing personnel.
